svg.title: Negative rect corner radii: a negative rx/ry computes to auto and mirrors the other radius; both negative gives square corners

h:meta.name: assert
h:meta.content: A negative rx (or ry) on a rect is invalid and computes to auto, so the used radius mirrors the other (valid) radius; when both rx and ry are negative both are auto and the used radii are 0 (square corners).
